🔧 CATEGORIZATION RULES
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Category 1 - Questions:
  Triggers: "how", "help", "tools", "cost", "timeline", "start", "tutorial"
  Action: Auto-respond with setup/info template ✅

Category 2 - Praise:
  Triggers: "amazing", "inspiring", "love", "great", "awesome", "thank"
  Action: Auto-respond with gratitude template ✅

Category 3 - Spam:
  Triggers: "crypto", "bitcoin", "mlm", "forex", "dm me", "click here"
  Action: Filter/ignore (no response) ✅

Category 4 - Sales/Partnerships:
  Triggers: "partnership", "collaboration", "sponsor", "work with", "deal"
  Action: Flag for manual review 🚩

💬 RESPONSE TEMPLATES
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Category 1 (Questions):
  "Thanks for the question! I appreciate your interest. Check our resources
   or community for detailed answers, or feel free to ask for clarification. 💡"

Category 2 (Praise):
  "Thank you so much for the kind words! 💙 Your support means the world to us.
   We hope to keep creating great content for you!"

Category 4 (Sales - Manual Review):
  "Thank you for reaching out! I appreciate your interest in working together.
   I'll review your proposal and get back to you shortly."
